query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `skillPerformanceMetrics` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `skillId` int NOT NULL,
  `date` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `triggerCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `uniqueUserCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `successCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `failureCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `successRate` decimal(5,4) DEFAULT '0.0000',
  `positiveCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `negativeCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `satisfactionRate` decimal(5,4) DEFAULT '0.0000',
  `conversionCount` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `conversionRate` decimal(5,4) DEFAULT '0.0000',
  `estimatedRevenue` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `avgProcessingTimeMs` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY `unique_skill_date` (`skillId`, `date`)
);
